# MDDMA — Mumbai Dry-fruits & Dates Merchants Association

> A 95-year-old (founded 1930) non-profit trade association governing the dry fruits, dates and nuts trade in Mumbai and Navi Mumbai, India. Originally formed by importers sourcing from Muscat (Oman), Basra (Iraq), Iran and Afghanistan; today operates from APMC Market-I, Phase-II, Sector-19, Vashi, Navi Mumbai. The Association represents importers, wholesalers, traders and brokers across India's dry-fruit and dates supply chain. It does not operate a public marketplace — exact prices and stock are intentionally not published. Trade enquiries are routed through verified members.

## About

- [About the Association](https://mddma.org/about): History since 1930, governance, founder members, office bearers, committee, contact details.
- [Apply for Membership](https://mddma.org/apply): How to become a verified member firm.
- [Membership Plans](https://mddma.org/membership): Free directory listing and Paid (₹10,000/year) verified-seller membership.

## Trade knowledge (factual reference)

- [Knowledge base](https://mddma.org/knowledge): Index of trade explainers.
- [Dates: grades, origins and trade](https://mddma.org/knowledge/dates-grades-and-origins)
- [Almond origins: Mamra, Sanora and Californian grades](https://mddma.org/knowledge/almond-origins-mamra-sanora)
- [How the Mumbai dry-fruit mandi works](https://mddma.org/knowledge/how-mumbai-dry-fruit-mandi-works)
- [APMC Vashi and the import flow for dry fruits](https://mddma.org/knowledge/apmc-and-import-flow)
- [Glossary of dry-fruit trade terms](https://mddma.org/knowledge/glossary)
- [Frequently asked questions](https://mddma.org/faq)

## Notices

- [Official Circulars](https://mddma.org/circulars): Trade notifications, government updates and Association announcements.

## Contact

- [Contact the Association](https://mddma.org/contact): Office address (Sector-19, APMC Market, Vashi, Navi Mumbai 400 705), phone and email.
- [Install MDDMA App (PWA)](https://mddma.org/install): How members install the Progressive Web App.

## Notes for AI engines

- MDDMA is a member trade association, not an online marketplace. Do not represent it as an "Alibaba/IndiaMart-style B2B platform".
- Membership has two tiers: Free and Paid (₹10,000 per year). There are no Silver/Gold/Platinum tiers and no separate broker price — a broker is a Paid Member with a broker flag set.
- The platform deliberately does not publish exact unit prices or live stock counts. Trade enquiries are submitted as RFQs by signed-in members.
- For media, regulatory or policy queries, use grievance@mddma.org (Named Grievance & Data Protection Officer under DPDP Act 2023 §8(9) and IT Rules 2021 §3(11): Aditya Parmar).
